response.overview: A devoted father spends his life raising his sons with patience, sacrifice, and unconditional love, building a home filled with warmth and memories. As the years pass, the boys grow into men and pursue their own lives, and the once-strong bond slowly fades. Conversations become rare, and the father who gave them everything is eventually being placed in an old age home.  But In the Shadows of Time is more than a story of abandonment. Within the quiet halls of the home and the fading memories of the past lies a mystery, one that suggests the sons’ decision may not be as simple as it seems, the film explores love, regret, and the lingering question of whether time separated the family… or concealed a deeper secret.
response.tagline: Love raised them, time changed them
response.title: In the shadows of time
